name: What mistakes do law firms make with answer engine optimization?
description: Generic/no EEAT content, no updates.[2][3] Add specifics.

mainEntity.name: What mistakes do law firms make with answer engine optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Generic/no EEAT content, no updates.[2][3] Add specifics.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Common mistakes: generic content, ignoring EEAT, no local details, infrequent updates.** These prevent AI selection.[2][3]

Leads to wasted effort; competitors dominate.[6] Avoid in competitive Fort Worth.

**Key factors:**
- No attorney attribution.[2]
- Overly salesy answers.[3]
- Missing resources.[2]
- Static FAQs.[3]

Audit site: ensure 80% content answers questions helpfully. Test and iterate monthly.
